---
title: "2 Week2---Portfolio"
author: "Yanxi Ren"
published: January 27th
---

Xaringan ppt presentation

```{r}
library(xaringanExtra)
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(url = "YR_presentation.html",
                              ratio = "16:9")
```

# 2.1 Summary

## 2.1.1 The production process of Quarto book

(1)open a blank RStudio session -\> New Project -\> New Directory -\> Quarto Book (2)generate file: index.qmd、intro.qmd、summary.qmd、reference.qmd、\_quarto.yml (3)insert new chapter: new file -\> quarto document -\> insert into .yml document (4)render: terminal -\> quarto preview
